goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'royal standard'.
Make sure you get 'food type' and 'price range'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called royal standard
Make sure you get food type and price range
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and price range
